expectations.evidence: Line 1 — DL3006: Always tag the version of an image explicitly - flagged as Warning
Line 4 — PG002: Avoid piping remote scripts to shell - flagged as Error
Line 5 — PG001 and Line 6 — PG001: Secrets detected in ENV or ARG - API_KEY and DB_PASSWORD both flagged as Errors
Line 7 — DL3020: Use COPY instead of ADD for files and folders - flagged as Error
Line 9 — DL3004: Do not use sudo - flagged as Error
Line 11 — PG011: Add a USER directive to avoid running as root - flagged as Warning
Line 2 — DL3059: Multiple consecutive RUN instructions - flagged as Info with fix showing combined && usage
